pulse-pressure.description: Free Pulse Pressure Calculator — Compute pulse pressure from systolic and diastolic readings. Monitor arterial stiffness and cardiovascular risk with this simple clinical measurement.

cardiac-output.description: Free Cardiac Output Calculator — Estimate cardiac output from heart rate and stroke volume. Assess how well your heart pumps blood to support vital organ function.

stroke-volume.description: Free Stroke Volume Calculator — Calculate stroke volume from cardiac output and heart rate. Measure the amount of blood pumped per heartbeat for cardiac assessment.

ejection-fraction.title: Ejection Fraction Calculator
ejection-fraction.description: Free Ejection Fraction Calculator — Estimate left ventricular ejection fraction from stroke volume and end-diastolic volume. Critical for diagnosing and monitoring heart failure.

heart-age.title: Heart Age Calculator
heart-age.description: Free Heart Age Calculator — Estimate your heart age based on blood pressure, BMI, smoking status, and other risk factors. Understand your cardiovascular risk compared to your chronological age.

framingham-risk-score.description: Free Framingham Risk Score Calculator — Estimate 10-year cardiovascular disease risk using the Framingham Heart Study model. Assess coronary heart disease risk for preventive care planning.

ascvd-risk.title: ASCVD Risk Calculator
ascvd-risk.description: Free ASCVD Risk Calculator — Estimate 10-year and lifetime atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease risk using the ACC/AHA pooled cohort equations. Guide statin therapy and prevention decisions.

chads-vasc-score.description: Free CHADS-VASc Score Calculator — Assess stroke risk in patients with atrial fibrillation using the CHADS-VASc scoring system. Guide anticoagulation therapy decisions for stroke prevention.
